ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the station */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the station */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the station */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the station is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the station is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the station's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transit_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the transit data record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station where data was collected */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the data entry */,
  "entries" INTEGER /* Total entries at the station for the day */,
  "exits" INTEGER /* Total exits from the station for the day */,
  "entries_hourly" INTEGER /* Hourly entries at the station */,
  "exits_hourly" INTEGER /* Hourly exits from the station */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Combined date and time for the record */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week (e.g., Monday, Tuesday, etc.) */,
  "holiday_indicator" INTEGER /* Binary indicator for whether the day is a holiday */,
  "school_day" INTEGER /* Binary indicator for whether the day is a school day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transit_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the weather data record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather observation */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the weather observation */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station for which data was collected */,
  "conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions (e.g., Clear, Cloudy) */,
  "fog" INTEGER /* Fog presence as a binary indicator */,
  "precipitation" INTEGER /* Amount of precipitation */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure */,
  "rain" INTEGER /* Rain presence as a binary indicator */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Fahrenheit */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in mph */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity percentage */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_conditions_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., transit planner, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions (e.g., view_reports, edit_data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "data_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the data analyzed in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., usage_analysis, weather_impact) */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* File format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report associated with the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., line chart, bar chart) */,
  "image_data" TEXT /* Binary image data for the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
